form.formComment: Second-up today. Last start finished third of 8 runners at Kempton Park on March 23 over 3200m, 2.75 len behind High Fibre with 75kg at $29. form.formComment: Recent form hard to fault. Last run finished second of 8 starters at Kempton Park on March 23 over 3200m, 2.25 len behind High Fibre with 69kg at $3.30. Before that came from midfield; finished fourth of 10 runners at Kempton Park on February 2 over 3200m, 14 len behind Gooloogong with 74kg at $6.50. Sure to improve again. Finds a suitable assignment and can return to winning form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Made a bad mistake at the second last hurdle.

form.formComment: Resumes after five months. Finished off last preparation didn't finish the race at Newbury November 6 over 3270m. First up last campaign didn't finish the race at this track October 13 over 4360m. Fitness an issue. Expected to struggle against these.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Fresh up after two months finished fourth in a small field at this track on March 18 over 3900m, 5.5 len behind Vol Royale with 71kg at $8. Previously to post a big 4.5 len win. Fontwell Park on October 26 over 3560m defeating Leaumec De Mee carrying 71kg at $101 in a hurdle. Has the ability to test the top fancies.

form.formComment: Resuming after a five months break. Finished off last campaign 6 of 10 starters at Carlisle November 30 over 3900m, slow track; 103 len behind Getaway Master carrying 74kg at $11.
